company.what_they_do: RedCentric (redcentric.site) is a recruitment and staffing agency offering professional recruitment and staffing solutions worldwide, with a stated focus on strategic hiring for long-term business growth. It is a small, lightly-web-present entity operating under the 'redcentric.site' domain — distinct from the well-known UK IT managed services company Redcentric PLC (redcentricplc.com).
raw_notes: Tagline: 'Professional Recruitment & Staffing Solutions Worldwide · Strategic hiring for long-term business growth'
Website is sparse — only a homepage was indexed; no 'About', 'Team', 'Services', or 'Contact' sub-pages surfaced in search results
No founding date, headcount, location, or named individuals found on the site
Domain is 'redcentric.site' (a .site TLD), not the better-known 'redcentricplc.com' (UK-listed IT MSP headquartered in Harrogate)

IMPORTANT: The two entities share the 'redcentric' name but are unrelated. The IT MSP is a public company (LON:RCN), founded 2013, ~450 staff, UK-focused managed services. The signup company (redcentric.site) is a recruitment agency with no apparent corporate overlap.
No press coverage, LinkedIn company page, Crunchbase, or Companies House entry found for redcentric.site specifically
No industry vertical specialisation mentioned on homepage (e.g., tech, healthcare, finance) — positioning is generic/global

individual.name: James
notes: Email prefix is 'admamjames' — unusual prefix; 'admam' could be a typo or abbreviation (possibly 'admin' + 'james', or a name like 'Adamjames')
No person named 'James' was findable via web search in connection with 'redcentric.site'
A 'James Purcell' appears on Redcentric PLC's (redcentricplc.com) careers site as Operations Manager / Head of Engineering — but this is a completely different company and should NOT be used
A 'James Hughes' appears as Network & Voice Team Leader at Redcentric PLC — again, wrong entity
No LinkedIn profile, bio, or any named individual associated with redcentric.site was found
Role is entirely unknown; given the company is a recruitment agency, James could be a recruiter, consultant, owner, or administrator
